holdings.infoBox: DMXF is an equity ETF with a total of 432 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.84%, Novartis AG at 2.62%, Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group at 1.98%, Tokyo Electron at 1.78%, and Commonwealth Bank of Australia at 1.76%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Advanced MSCI EAFE ETF (DMXF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE Choice ESG Screened index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted, ESG-screened index of large- and mid-cap stocks from the developed markets outside North America. DMXF was launched on Jun 16, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI EAFE Choice ESG Screened Index
